metadata.description: Application Insights resource name for the API
Application Insights resource name for the Function App
Azure region for PostgreSQL (can differ from primary location)
Storage account name for blob data (globally unique, 3-24 lowercase alphanumeric)
App Service Plan name for the API
Web App name for the API
Function App Flex Consumption plan name
Storage account name for Functions runtime (leave empty to share the data account)
Custom domain hostname for the App Service (e.g., api.preflightapi.io). Leave empty to skip.
Certificate name in Key Vault for the App Service custom domain. Leave empty to skip.
NOAA API key for weather data (used by API and Functions)
Stripe Price ID for Private Pilot tier
Stripe Price ID for Commercial Pilot tier
Clerk JWT authority URL (leave empty to omit from app settings)
Clerk secret key (leave empty to omit)
Quiet period in minutes between alerts
Resend segment ID for all users
Object ID of the GitHub deployment service principal
Application Insights resource name for the API
Application Insights resource name for the Function App
Function App Application Insights connection string
Function App Application Insights resource ID
Azure region for the PostgreSQL server
Allow Azure services to access the server
PostgreSQL server fully qualified domain name
Storage account name for blob data (globally unique, 3-24 lowercase alphanumeric)
Separate storage account name for Functions runtime (leave empty to share the data account)
Functions storage account name (shared or dedicated)
Azure region for the Key Vault
Azure AD tenant ID (defaults to current subscription tenant)
App Service Plan SKU name (e.g., F1, B1, B2)
App Service Plan SKU tier (e.g., Free, Basic)
Storage account name for managed identity access
NOAA API key for weather data
Stripe Price ID for Private Pilot tier
Stripe Price ID for Commercial Pilot tier
Custom domain hostname (e.g., api.preflightapi.io). Leave empty to skip the binding.
Key Vault resource ID for custom domain SSL cert lookup.
Name of the cert/secret in Key Vault for the custom domain. Leave empty to skip.
Web App system-assigned managed identity principal ID
Function App Flex Consumption plan name
Functions storage account name (created by storage module)
Storage account name for managed identity access
NOAA API key for weather data synchronization
Clerk JWT authority URL (leave empty to omit)
Clerk secret key (leave empty to omit)
Key Vault name for certificate storage
Health endpoint URL for outage monitoring
Quiet period in minutes between alerts
Resend segment ID for all users

variables.clerkSettings: [if(and(empty(parameters('clerkAuthority')), empty(parameters('clerkSecretKey'))), createArray(), concat(if(empty(parameters('clerkAuthority')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'ClerkSettings__Authority', 'value', parameters('clerkAuthority')), createObject('name', 'ClerkSettings__RequireAuthenticationInDevelopment', 'value', 'true'))), if(empty(parameters('clerkSecretKey')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'ClerkSettings__SecretKey', 'value', parameters('clerkSecretKey'))))))]
variables.certificateSettings: [if(empty(parameters('certificateAcmeEmail')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'CertificateRenewal__AcmeEmail', 'value', parameters('certificateAcmeEmail')), createObject('name', 'CertificateRenewal__CertificateName', 'value', parameters('certificateCertName')), createObject('name', 'CertificateRenewal__Domain', 'value', parameters('certificateDomain')), createObject('name', 'CertificateRenewal__KeyVaultName', 'value', parameters('certificateKeyVaultName')), createObject('name', 'CertificateRenewal__RootDomain', 'value', parameters('certificateRootDomain'))))]
variables.resendSettings: [if(empty(parameters('resendApiToken')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'Resend__ApiToken', 'value', parameters('resendApiToken')), createObject('name', 'Resend__Enabled', 'value', parameters('resendEnabled')), createObject('name', 'Resend__FromAddress', 'value', parameters('resendFromAddress')), createObject('name', 'Resend__HealthEndpointUrl', 'value', parameters('resendHealthEndpointUrl')), createObject('name', 'Resend__QuietPeriodMinutes', 'value', parameters('resendQuietPeriodMinutes')), createObject('name', 'Resend__ReplyToAddress', 'value', parameters('resendReplyToAddress')), createObject('name', 'Resend__SegmentAllId', 'value', parameters('resendSegmentAllId')), createObject('name', 'Resend__TopicAlertsId', 'value', parameters('resendTopicAlertsId'))))]

siteConfig.appSettings: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'AzureWebJobsStorage', 'value', format('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName={0};EndpointSuffix={1};AccountKey={2}', parameters('functionsStorageAccountName'), environment().suffixes.storage, listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('functionsStorageAccountName')), '2023-05-01').keys[0].value)), createObject('name', 'DEPLOYMENT_STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', format('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName={0};EndpointSuffix={1};AccountKey={2}', parameters('functionsStorageAccountName'), environment().suffixes.storage, listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('functionsStorageAccountName')), '2023-05-01').keys[0].value)), createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', parameters('appInsightsConnectionString')), createObject('name', 'Database__Host', 'value', parameters('databaseHost')), createObject('name', 'Database__Database', 'value', parameters('databaseName')), createObject('name', 'Database__Username', 'value', parameters('databaseUsername')), createObject('name', 'Database__Password', 'value', parameters('databasePassword')), createObject('name', 'Database__Port', 'value', '5432'), createObject('name', 'CloudStorage__UseManagedIdentity', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'CloudStorage__AccountName', 'value', parameters('storageAccountName')), createObject('name', 'CloudStorage__TerminalProceduresContainerName', 'value', parameters('terminalProceduresContainerName')), createObject('name', 'CloudStorage__ChartSupplementsContainerName', 'value', parameters('chartSupplementsContainerName')), createObject('name', 'CloudStorage__PreflightApiResourcesContainerName', 'value', parameters('preflightApiResourcesContainerName')), createObject('name', 'NmsSettings__BaseUrl', 'value', parameters('nmsBaseUrl')), createObject('name', 'NmsSettings__AuthBaseUrl', 'value', parameters('nmsAuthBaseUrl')), createObject('name', 'NmsSettings__ClientId', 'value', parameters('nmsClientId')), createObject('name', 'NmsSettings__ClientSecret', 'value', parameters('nmsClientSecret')), createObject('name', 'NOAASettings__NOAAApiKey', 'value', parameters('noaaApiKey'))), variables('clerkSettings'), variables('certificateSettings'), variables('porkbunSettings'), variables('resendSettings'))]

metadata.description: Function App system-assigned managed identity principal ID
Storage account name for blob data
Principal ID of the Web App managed identity
Principal ID of the Function App managed identity
Principal ID of the GitHub deployment identity (optional)
Key Vault name for RBAC assignments
PostgreSQL server name for RBAC assignments
Azure region for log query alert rules
Resource ID of the API Web App (for HTTP 5xx metric alert)
Resource ID of the Function App Application Insights (for log query alerts)

properties.description: Fires when the API returns more than 5 HTTP 5xx errors in a 5-minute window
Fires when Azure Functions have more than 3 failed executions in 10 minutes
Fires when FAA/NOAA APIs remove or rename required fields that the application depends on. Needs immediate investigation.

allOf.query: traces | where severityLevel == 3 | where message has "Schema drift detected"

properties.description: Fires when FAA/NOAA APIs add new fields not present in schema manifests. Informational - update manifests when convenient.

allOf.query: traces | where severityLevel == 2 | where message has "Schema drift detected"

metadata.description: Function App Application Insights connection string
